0.q: The expression levels of cell wall biosynthesis genes Ccw14p, Cha1p, Cwp2p, Sed1p, Rlm1p, Rom2p, Mkk1p, Hsp12p, Mkk2p, Sdp1p and YLR194c were significantly enhanced...These results suggest that the Bra034084 and Bra029784 genes regulate cell wall biosynthesis and the defense regulatory system under salt stresses.

1.q: The expression levels of cell wall biosynthesis genes Ccw14p, Cha1p, Cwp2p, Sed1p, Rlm1p, Rom2p, Mkk1p, Hsp12p, Mkk2p, Sdp1p and YLR194c were significantly enhanced...These results suggest that the Bra034084 and Bra029784 genes regulate cell wall biosynthesis and the defense regulatory system under salt stresses.

2.q: The cabbage genome harbors three genes that encode RZs, designated as BrRZ1 (Bra025205), BrRZ2 (Bra032933) and BrRZ3 (Bra005798).

3.q: the expression of BrJAZ1a, BrJAZ6a, BrJAZ6b, BrJAZ10a, and BrJAZ10b was significantly enhanced by both MeJA treatment and black rot pathogen infection.

4.q: the expression of BrJAZ1a, BrJAZ6a, BrJAZ6b, BrJAZ10a, and BrJAZ10b was significantly enhanced by both MeJA treatment and black rot pathogen infection.

6.q: The cabbage genome harbors three genes that encode RZs, designated as BrRZ1 (Bra025205), BrRZ2 (Bra032933) and BrRZ3 (Bra005798).

7.q: A total of 27 S1fa proteins were clustered into three groups (I, II and III)...Bra034084, Bra006994 and Bra029784 were clustered into group II.

8.q: APX enzyme assay was performed using recombinant purified proteins to validate their functional roles. Further, the stress tolerance study was conducted on the E. coli cells with/without the genes under various abiotic stresses.
